mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings (user_id, theme, custom_bg_color, custom_border_color, custom_font_color, custom_input_bg_color, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{theme}, #{customBgColor}, #{customBorderColor}, #{customFontColor}, #{customInputBgColor}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_settings SET theme = #{theme}, custom_bg_color = #{customBgColor}, custom_border_color = #{customBorderColor}, custom_font_color = #{customFontColor}, custom_input_bg_color = #{customInputBgColor}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
